use_cases: Indicates loading state while content fetches from an API
Shows progress during async operations in forms or data tables
Displays during page transitions or route changes
Signals background processing in dashboard widgets
Provides visual feedback during user-initiated actions
ai_summary: A multi-row animated dot loader component that displays staggered dots across four rows with varying counts to create a wave-like loading effect. The component uses styled-components for styling and provides visual feedback during async operations, page transitions, or content loading states across any platform.
